Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Awaken]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — An object can be Awakened using Intent and proper equipment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — When a Reader decides to Awaken an object, the tool gains a rudimentary consciousness related to its task.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius was asked how long it would take him to Awaken and bond the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart must be Awakened.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — One must Awaken an entire ship to make it a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Lucan can Awaken his copper spoon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Awakening a knife locks the object in a single form and prevents it from absorbing Intent again.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Reading can be used to temporarily Awaken stone.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Awakening is related to active Reading.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
